title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama. Works in Node, Bun, Deno, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, file upload, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and reactive streaming.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama. Generate, chat, and pull models from Ruby scripts or Rails apps.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with fzf model picker and chat history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot proxy that routes completions through a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models for generative question answering and embeddings.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All chat UI with optional Ollama backend switch; run local models in a polished desktop app.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET SDK for Ollama. Targets .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM workflows.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial async Rust client for Ollama using reqwest and tokio.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that adds a chat sidebar powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + LangChain.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats in channels or threads using Ollama models.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package definition for Ollama enabling reproducible installs on Linux/macOS.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client for Ollama generated from OpenAPI specs; supports chat, generate, and embeddings.
